step_rationale: Decreased arachidonic-acid-containing phosphatidylcholine predicts heart-failure after MI; injury and remodeling marker.
mechanism: Decreased PC (20:3/20:4) content post-MI reflects eicosanoid-precursor lipid depletion and myocardial dysfunction.

references.title: Lipidomic analyses reveal potential biomarkers for predicting death and heart failure after acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry
